properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

approvers.description: List of approvers for the approval request

ticketId.description: Ticket ID for the approval request

stateChangedAt.description: Approval request state change time, time at which approval request state changed from pending to approved or rejected.

mandatoryApprovers.description: List of mandatory approvers for the approval request

minimumApproversRequired.description: Minimum number of approvers required for the approval request

approversApprovedCount.description: Current count of minimum approvers required

mandatoryApproversApprovedCount.description: Current count of mandatory approvers that have approved

approvedByEntraIds.description: Array of Entra IDs of approvers who have approved the approval request

requestMetadata.description: Request metadata for the approval request.

mandatoryApprovalGroupMembershipIds.description: Indicates if this approver is part of a mandatory approver group with list of Entra IDs

resourceAction.description: Resource Action of the item being approved or declined.

approvalCallbackRoute.description: Route name for the approval callback

approvalCallbackPayload.description: Payload to be sent upon any action on approval request

approvalStatus.description: Status of the approval. Uses ApprovalStatus enum.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

identity.description: The managed service identities assigned to this resource.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

resourceCollection.description: List of resource ids created by communities.

governedServiceList.description: List of services governed by a community.

policyOverride.description: Policy override setting for the community. Specifies whether to apply enclave-specific policies or disable policy enforcement.

firewallSku.description: SKU of the community's Azure Firewall (Basic, Standard, Premium). Standard is the default

approvalSettings.description: Granular approval requirements for various actions on the community's resources.

monitoringSettings.description: Community Monitoring Settings for diagnostic and virtual network flow logs

id.description: Resource identifier of a Managed-On-Behalf-Of broker resource

option.description: Governance option for this service (Allow, Deny, ExceptionOnly, or NotApplicable).

policyAction.description: Enforcement mode for policy. AuditOnly, Enforce, or None.

principals.description: List of principal IDs to which to assign this role definition

condition.description: Condition under which the principal can be granted permission

id.description: The object id associated with the principal

type.description: The type of the object id. We currently allow users, groups, and service principals

communityEndpointUpdate.description: Approval configuration for community endpoint updates.

enclaveEndpointUpdate.description: Approval configuration for enclave endpoint updates.

communityMaintenanceMode.description: Approval configuration for community maintenance mode.

enclaveMaintenanceMode.description: Approval configuration for enclave maintenance mode.

minimumApproversRequired.description: Minimum number of approvers required for this approval setting.

mandatoryApprovers.description: List of mandatory approvers for this approval setting.

mode.description: Current mode of Maintenance Mode Configuration

principals.description: The user, group or service principal object affected by Maintenance Mode

justification.description: Justification for entering or exiting Maintenance Mode

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. E.g. "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}"

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

designation.description: Designation of hub resource allocation (Pooled or Reserved)

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation.

diagnosticDestinations.description: Log Analytics workspace destinations where diagnostic logs will be stored.

flowLogDestination.description: Log Analytics workspace destination where virtual network flow logs will be stored.

destinationType.description: The type of monitoring workspace destination

customWorkspaceResourceId.description: Log analytics workspace resource ID for custom workspace

principalId.description: The service principal ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

tenantId.description: The tenant ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

type.description: Type of managed service identity (where both SystemAssigned and UserAssigned types are allowed).

userAssignedIdentities.description: The set of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The userAssignedIdentities dictionary keys will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}. The dictionary values can be empty objects ({}) in requests.

principalId.description: The principal ID of the assigned identity.

clientId.description: The client ID of the assigned identity.

ports.description: Port. Can include multiple ports separated by commas or a range indicated by a hyphen.
